sections.title: History

sections.title: Design
sections.content: While this roller coaster has the typical Wacky Worm layout, it is somewhat smaller than the average Wacky Worm coaster.

fullText:
Crazy Clown is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by Dutch showman Buwalda.

Has attended Hyde Park Winter Wonderland in England, UK in 2015 and 2016.

While this roller coaster has the typical Wacky Worm layout, it is somewhat smaller than the average Wacky Worm coaster.




 * Overhead shot of the ride
